mapper.insert: INSERT INTO claim (lost_found_id, claimer_id, description, contact_phone, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{lostFoundId}, #{claimerId}, #{description}, #{contactPhone}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT c.* FROM claim c JOIN lost_found lf ON c.lost_found_id = lf.id WHERE lf.user_id = #{ownerId} ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
